title: DataLakeCatalog REST catalog fails to discover tables in nested/hierarchical namespaces
description:
# DataLakeCatalog REST catalog fails to discover tables in nested/hierarchical namespaces
## Summary
When using `DataLakeCatalog` with an Iceberg REST catalog (Snowflake Polaris) that has hierarchical/nested namespaces, ClickHouse fails to discover tables because it uses incorrect URL encoding for nested namespace paths.
## ClickHouse Version
- Version: 25.8.12.20747.altinityantalya
- Also affects: Any version with DataLakeCatalog REST catalog support
## Environment
- Iceberg REST Catalog: Snowflake Polaris
- Namespace structure: Two-level hierarchy (e.g., `teslasource` → `kafkav6` → `source-data`)
## Steps to Reproduce
1. Create a DataLakeCatalog database connected to a Polaris catalog with nested namespaces:
```sql
SET allow_experimental_database_iceberg = 1;
CREATE DATABASE polaris_iceberg
ENGINE = DataLakeCatalog('https://example.snowflakecomputing.com/polaris/api/catalog')
SETTINGS
catalog_type = 'rest',
warehouse = 'my-warehouse',
auth_scope = 'PRINCIPAL_ROLE:ALL',
oauth_server_uri = 'https://example.snowflakecomputing.com/polaris/api/catalog/v1/oauth/tokens',
catalog_credential = 'client_id:client_secret';
```
2. Try to list tables:
```sql
SET show_data_lake_catalogs_in_system_tables = 1;
SHOW TABLES FROM polaris_iceberg;
```
3. Result: Empty - no tables discovered
## Expected Behavior
Tables in nested namespaces should be discovered and accessible, e.g.:
- `polaris_iceberg.\`teslasource.kafkav6.source-data\``
## Actual Behavior
ClickHouse discovers the nested namespaces but fails to query tables due to incorrect URL encoding.
### Debug Logs
When running with `SET send_logs_level = 'trace'`, the logs show:
```
ReadWriteBufferFromHTTP: Failed to make request to
'https://example.snowflakecomputing.com/polaris/api/catalog/v1/my-warehouse/namespaces/teslasource.kafkav2/tables'
HTTP status code: 404 'Not Found'
body: '{"error":{"message":"Namespace does not exist: teslasource.kafkav2","type":"NoSuchNamespaceException","code":404}}'
```
## Root Cause
ClickHouse's `DataLake::RestCatalog::getTables()` constructs the namespace path using a **dot (`.`)** separator:
```
/namespaces/teslasource.kafkav2/tables  ❌ WRONG
```
But the [Iceberg REST Catalog OpenAPI spec](https://github.com/apache/iceberg/blob/main/open-api/rest-catalog-open-api.yaml) requires nested namespaces to be encoded with **unit separator (`%1F` / ASCII 0x1F)**:
```
/namespaces/teslasource%1Fkafkav2/tables  ✅ CORRECT
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE polaris_iceberg.teslasource_kafkav6_source_data (id INTEGER, name TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM polaris_iceberg.teslasource_kafkav6_source_data WHERE id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'polaris_iceberg';
key_bug_features: Incorrect URL encoding for nested namespace paths
